title: Add SSH Key for Secure Server Access
description: User wants to add their SSH public key to their account so they can securely access their projects via SSH without passwords.
prompt: I want to set up SSH key authentication for my mittwald account. I have my public key ready. Can you show me my current SSH keys and then add a new one? My public key is ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIExample... developer@laptop
